tasks.name: Full anatomy rescan
tasks.description: Re-scans project filesystem and reconciles anatomy.md

tasks.name: Consolidate old memory
tasks.description: Compress memory.md entries older than 7 days

tasks.name: Cerebrum reflection
tasks.description: Weekly AI review of cerebrum.md — prune stale entries, consolidate duplicates

params.prompt: Review this cerebrum.md. Remove duplicate preferences (keep newer). Remove Do-Not-Repeat entries older than 90 days if no longer relevant. Consolidate Key Learnings that overlap. Keep the file under 2000 tokens. Return the cleaned file content only.

tasks.name: AI suggestions
tasks.description: Weekly AI analysis with project improvement suggestions

params.prompt: Based on the recent memory entries and current project structure, provide: 1) Key achievements this week, 2) Code improvements to consider, 3) Logical next tasks, 4) Technical debt or risks. Be specific and actionable. Return as JSON: {achievements:[], improvements:[], next_tasks:[], risks:[]}
